role_summary: the internal auditor evaluates internal controls, processes, and risk management to improve  operational efficiency and governance.
responsibilities: • conduct internal audits across departmen ts  • evaluate internal control effectiveness   • identify operational and financial risks   • recommend process improvements   • prepare audit reports and follow -up actions   • support management in strengthening controls
qualifications: • ca qualification   • strong int ernal audit and process review skills   • analytical and investigative mindset   • good communication and reporting skills
